variants.title: Donaldson K070430 Hydraulic Filter Assembly
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson K070430 Hydraulic Filter Assembly offers a complete solution for hydraulic filtration, integrating high-performance filters with durable housings for optimal system protection. It ensures clean hydraulic fluid, supporting efficient operation and reducing wear on critical components. Designed for versatility and ease of use, this assembly accommodates various filter types and sizes. Its robust construction makes it suitable for a wide range of hydraulic applications, from industrial machinery to mobile equipment.
specifications: Style: Hydraulic Filter Assembly, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 25µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 169.0 mm, Length: 294.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 25µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose
